text: this morning I had two eggs and toast and for lunch I grabbed a turkey sandwich and then I had an apple as a snack
_comment: RUN-ON MULTI-MEAL: No punctuation, three meals described in one breath. Step 1 must extract 5 items: egg (x2), toast, turkey sandwich, apple — and ignore the temporal connectors ('this morning', 'for lunch', 'as a snack') which are not food items. Tests segmentation when the speaker describes an entire day without pauses or commas.
